name: Imidazolidinyl Urea
description: Imidazolidinyl Urea is an antimicrobial preservative found in cosmetics. It is often used to protect against the damage caused by yeast, bacteria or mold included in the formulas. It is generally used with other preservatives in order to cover the widest possible spectrum.It is considered a liberator of formaldehyde in cosmetics.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Inulin
description: Inulin is a simple sugar (fructose) produced naturally by many plants. It is used instead of conventional sugars in food preparations. In cosmetics, it is used to soften skin and hair. It is used as a hair conditioner.
common_product_types: 2-in-1 shampoo and body wash for baby (4.7%)
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Isoamyl P-Methoxycinnamate
description: Isoamyl P-Methoxycinnamate (Amiloxate) is a chemical UV filter authorized in Europe, which protects against UVB rays. Listed in CORAP since 2016, the ingredient is suspected of being an endocrine disruptor (Environment), and European health authorities are still awaiting additional information!ECHA (European Chemical Industry) concluded in 2018 that additional information was required to enable the competent authority of the evaluating Member State (Federal Office for Chemicals, Germany) to complete the assessment to determine whether the substance constitutes a hazard or a risk to the environment.The concern regarding the ingredient relates to the potential for environmental endocrine disruption in non-mammalian species (amphibians). The endocrine activity of the substance in amphibians needs to be clarified to determine whether it poses a hazard and/or a risk to the environment.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Isobutane
description: Isobutane (like butane) is a refrigerant and aerosol used as a substitute for CFCs and HFCs to limit the impact on the ozone layer and the greenhouse effect. It has a low impact on the environment. It may have a weak anesthetic effect and / or an asphyxiant effect by depletion of the oxygen content. It is a low CO2 emitter.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Isododecane
description: Isododecane is a branched-chain aliphatic hydrocarbon derived from petroleum. This mineral oil is an emollient, which improves the distribution of cosmetic products on the skin, offering a light, non-greasy feel. It is associated with an orange flower on our application, given its petrochemical origin.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

description: Isoeicosane — косметический ингредиент.

name: Isoeugenyl Acetate
description: Isoeugenyl acetate is a synthetic aromatic compound found in cosmetics. It is an acetylated version of isoeugenol. It is one of the regulated allergens in Europe.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Isoeugenol
description: Isoeugenol is an aromatic compound that is one of the allergens regulated by Europe. It occurs naturally in the essential oils of ylang-ylang, clove, and cinnamon. Its aroma is both sweet and spicy.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Происхождение: Natural.

name: Isobutylparaben
description: This ingredient has been banned in cosmetics in Europe since July 30, 2015.

name: Isohexadecane

name: Isopropyl Myristate
description: Isopropyl Myristate is an organic solvent. It is widely used in cosmetics and pharmaceuticals (in emulsion with water, to facilitate penetration of products into the skin).
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Isopropyl Palmitate
description: Isoporpyl palmitate is used in cosmetics as a skin lubricant. It makes it softer and smoother. It can also be used as a binder.

name: Isopropyl Alcohol
description: Isopropyl alcohol is one of the most widely used alcohols in cosmetics. Discovered in the 1920s, it is synthesized from a reaction between propylene and sulfuric acid, followed by hydrolysis. It is used as an antiseptic in cosmetic products: it is found for example in aftershave lotions, hand lotions.Note that the oxidation of isopropyl alcohol produces acetone.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Isostearyl Alcohol
description: Isostearyl alcohol is a fatty alcohol used. It is used in cosmetics as an emollient, that is, it softens and eases the skin. It is authorized in organic.The CIR (Cosmetic Ingredient Review) in an annual report published in 2008, concluded the safety of fatty alcohols.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.
